common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.hero_title: Gain insight and stay on course
home.hero_sub: Fitkompas maps your movement behaviour and motivation. In 15 minutes you know where you stand — and what gets you moving.
home.usp_sub: Fitkompas shows how you relate to movement — not with judgement, but with a compass.

usp_items.title: Your profile
usp_items.text: Through 60 statements we map your movement behaviour and motivation on a 2x2 quadrant.

usp_items.title: Clear insight
usp_items.text: You immediately see where you stand: active or passive, motivated or not yet. No judgement, just direction.

usp_items.title: Get moving
usp_items.text: With your profile, your coach can give you targeted guidance that truly suits you.

home.quadrant_sub: Fitkompas places you in one of four quadrants based on your behaviour and motivation. That way, you — and your coach — know exactly what the best approach is for you.
home.cta_sub: Complete the questionnaire and get immediate insight into your motivation and behaviour.

login.title: Log in
login.error: Email address or password is incorrect.

register.title: Create account
register.title_invited: You've been invited — create an account
register.code_hint: Have you received a code? Enter it here.
register.error_invalid_token: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.
register.error_email_mismatch: This email address does not match the invitation.
register.error_in_use: This email address is already in use. Try logging in.

register_coach.title: Create coach account
register_coach.stripe_note: You will be redirected to Stripe for secure payment.
register_coach.error_failed: Failed to start payment. Please try again.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.intro: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.sent_text2: is known to us, you'll receive an email with a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.error: Something went wrong. Check your email address and try again.

reset_password.title: Set new password
reset_password.error_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset_password.error_failed: Something went wrong. Please request a new reset link.

survey.error_answer: Please choose an answer to continue.

active_motivated.title: Active & Motivated
active_motivated.description: You approach movement and health positively. With a clear goal in mind and a dose of drive, you give sufficient attention to movement and health.

active_unmotivated.title: Active & Not motivated
active_unmotivated.description: You manage to work actively on movement and health, but you don't really enjoy it. The risk of relapse is high if the main reason for exercising is no longer relevant.

inactive_motivated.title: Not active & Motivated
inactive_motivated.description: You want to work actively on movement and health, but you can't quite make the step towards DOING. Various causes may undermine the step to action.

inactive_unmotivated.title: Not active & Not motivated
inactive_unmotivated.description: Without experience in sport and movement, without openness to change and missing social support, it becomes difficult to become active and motivated. But it IS possible — step by step.

pricing.hero_sub: Fitkompas maps the movement profile of your respondents — with a scientifically based questionnaire and immediately usable reports.

usps.title: Immediate insight
usps.text: Every respondent immediately receives their personal movement profile — you as coach see the result right away.

usps.title: Group report
usps.text: See at a glance how your group is distributed across the four quadrants.

usps.title: Your own invite link
usps.text: Share your unique coach code or link and respondents are linked directly to you.

pricing.plans_sub: No hidden costs. Get started right away.
pricing.cta_sub: Register in 2 minutes and send your first respondent an invitation today.
